title: AutoLogin
description: Logs into authme/xauth servers automatically based on a password set in a file.
body:
# AutoLogin for Beta 1.7.3
Put your password in passwords.txt, the mod reads it and types /login [YOURPASSWORD] in when you join any server.
Uses Babric and StationAPI
![The mod automatically logging in](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5369a3f80361332bdee74f448d054967429acba5.png)

## Planned features
- Make it wait for a login prompt before sending password
- Add multiple usernames
- Add config page
- Make it use different passwords for different servers
## Ideas
- Auto register with genarated password
- Store password more securely
- Different password for different servers

Credit to Argagaes for original modloader version.

**Open to contributions**
